nasb.text: He shall bring his guilt offering to the Lord to the doorway of the tent of meeting, a ram for a guilt offering.

esv.text: but he shall bring his compensation to the Lord, to the entrance of the tent of meeting, a ram for a guilt offering.

cnv.text: 那人要把他的贖愆祭，就是一隻作贖愆祭的公綿羊，帶到會幕門口，耶和華面前。

ccb.text: 和她同寝的人要把一只公绵羊牵到会幕门口，作为赎过祭献给耶和华。
